title: Sonner
description: An opinionated toast component for React.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install the required dependencies for the sonner component.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the Toaster component code.

manual.title: Add the Toaster to your layout
manual.description: Add the Toaster component to your root layout.

examples.title: Default
examples.description: A basic example showing a toast triggered by a button click.

examples.title: Types
examples.description: Use the toast function variants to display different types of toasts.

examples.title: Description
examples.description: Pass a description option to add more context below the toast title.

examples.title: Position
examples.description: Use the position prop on the Toaster to change where toasts appear on screen.

examples.title: Close Button
examples.description: Set closeButton on the Toaster to show a dismiss button on each toast.

examples.title: Rich Colors
examples.description: Set richColors on the Toaster to apply semantic background colors to each toast type.

examples.title: Direction
examples.description: Use the dir prop to control text direction. Accepts ltr, rtl, or auto.

examples.title: Visible Toasts
examples.description: Use the visibleToasts prop to control how many toasts are shown at once.

examples.title: Gap
examples.description: Use the gap prop to control the spacing between stacked toasts.
